title: Make Agent Workspace integration probing compatible with production Git
goal: Replace the Agent Workspace base-drift integration probe's unconditional use of git merge-tree --write-tree with a deterministic, side-effect-free compatibility path that works on the production Git 2.34.1 baseline while preserving exact conflict detection and bounded evidence.

acceptance.assertion: A regression test reproduces the current Git 2.34.1 failure where git merge-tree --write-tree exits 128 with fatal: unknown rev --write-tree.
Agent Workspace derives conflict or clean integration truth on the supported production Git baseline without mutating the repository, writer worktree, branch, index or refs.
Where the newer merge-tree mode is available, the compatibility result is checked to be semantically consistent for clean and conflicting histories.
Unsupported capability, missing objects and internal probe errors remain distinct from a genuine merge conflict and cannot be reported as conflicting=true solely because the command is unavailable.
A base-drifted workspace status on heim-pc returns a valid bounded integration_probe instead of fatal: unknown rev --write-tree.

does_not_establish: that the historical T014 writer result is mergeable
permission to modify or clean the foreign T014 worktree
permission to rewrite historical workspace evidence
that every nonzero merge probe result is a genuine conflict
